stemHtml: Departing Lille as F-GTPO, three aircraft ahead at the holding point. ATC says: "F-PO, contact Lille Tower 118.550". What do you do?

options.a: Readback "118.550, F-PO", switch, wait for Tower to call you.
options.b: Readback "Calling 118.550, F-PO", switch, and call Lille Tower.
options.c: Readback "Contacting 118.550, F-PO", switch, wait for Tower.
options.d: Readback "118.550, F-PO", switch, and call Lille Tower.
